titles.en: Houses and graves as paradises for believers

text: وبهذا الاسناد قال: قال أبو عبد الله عليه السلام: دياركم لكم جنّة، وقبوركم لكم جنّة، للجنّة خلقتم، وإلى الجنّة تصيرون.

en.badr-shahin: (The same previous series of relaters)… that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Your houses are your paradises. Your graves are your paradises. You were created for Paradise and you will be in Paradise.
